query_normalized: assessing the sensitivity of regression coefficients to dataset subset selection statistics
rationale: This paper qualifies under category (a) and (b) because it explicitly investigates the construction of confidence intervals and p-values for regression coefficients by regressing on a specific "subset of variables" (the Markov neighborhood), which directly addresses the user's interest in how regression coefficients are affected by dataset subset selection. Although the paper focuses on high-dimensional variable selection rather than general data subset sampling, it provides canonical evidence o
